strategy: Both bosses punish setup, so buff carefully. Drake answers any damage or pierce Charm, Trap, Aura, or Global with a 500 Storm Duck Savage, and even secondary effects count.
Quentin mirrors your hanging effects: single blades draw Weakness, shields draw Hex, and AoE versions draw the mass versions, so avoid mass buffs and mass Feints.
Prefer clean, enchanted single blades and hit quickly rather than stacking many charms and traps. Multi-target charms bounce Drake's Duck Savage back onto the caster.
Drake is Storm and resists Storm 57% and other schools 27%, taking 30% more from Myth, so bring Myth to hit through his resist.
Funnel blades to one hitter and hit the same Round you set up to minimize the reactive punishes.
cheatNotes: If you cast any damage or pierce Charm, Trap, Aura, or Global, Drake hits the recipient with a 500-damage Storm Duck Savage.
Multi-target versions land the Duck Savage on you, the caster, instead.
Even secondary effects, like a blade tacked onto another spell, set off this cheat.
Quentin answers your hanging effects with a matching cheat cast, listed below.
Secondary effects, such as the blade on Sound of Musicology, also trigger Quentin.
A single helpful Charm makes Quentin hit that ally with Weakness.
A helpful Charm on all allies makes Quentin cast Mass Weakness.
A single harmful Charm on an enemy makes Quentin give it a Balanceblade.
A harmful Charm on all enemies makes Quentin cast a +25% Bladestorm on them.
A single helpful Ward makes Quentin cast Hex on that ally.
A helpful Ward on all allies makes Quentin cast Mass Hex.
A single harmful Ward on an enemy makes Quentin give it a Tower Shield.
A harmful Ward on all enemies makes Quentin cast Legion Shield on them.
Mass Feint also triggers this cheat.
